Store one e-signature image file per person (PNG or JPG recommended).

Suggested filenames (examples):
  xsy.png
  hwk.png

In data/contacts.json, set "signature_image" for that contact to a path **relative to the skill folder**, e.g.:
  "signature_image": "assets/signatures/xsy.png"

Or use an absolute Windows path if you prefer.

CLI examples:
  python scripts/contacts_tool.py set --abbrev xsy --signature-image "assets/signatures/xsy.png"
  python scripts/contacts_tool.py set --abbrev xsy --clear-signature

Generate Word with the same person's printed name + e-sig from the DB row:
  python scripts/generate_site_memo_docx.py --signatory-contact xsy ...

Optional width:
  python scripts/generate_site_memo_docx.py --signatory-contact xsy --signature-width-inches 2.5 ...
